name: Pad Thai - Vegetarian
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add the rice noodles and cook until al dente, about 8-10 minutes.
3. Drain the noodles and set aside.
4. In a separate pan, sauté the mung bean sprouts with a bit of oil until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Toss the cooked noodles with the sautéed sprouts.
6. Serve hot, garnished with additional sprouts if desired.
